title: taraxacum lanigerum
intro: Taraxacum lanigerum, also known as the hairy dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to Europe and Asia. It possesses medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The hairy dandelion is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum lanigerum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
